announcement.bar: WE'VE GONE SOLO • BOOK DIRECT & SAVE FEES
announcement.title: We've Gone Wild.
announcement.subtitle: From platforms to 100% independent.
announcement.body: We realized something important: We'd rather invest in our guests than in platform fees. By booking direct, the 15% service fee stays in your pocket. Same luxury, better price.

destinations.headline: Atmospheric Retreats
destinations.tagline: Sound on. Breath slows. Pages turn.

cabin.name: The Cabin
cabin.description: Nestled in the rugged folds of the Pirin Mountains, The Cabin is a testament to the beauty of subtraction. Formerly 'Bucephalus', this is a sanctuary for the over-connected.

valley.name: The Valley
valley.description: Suspended between earth and sky at 1,550m. A collection of 13 A-frames and a communal Stone House designed for the modern drifter.

seasonToggle.groupAria: Switch between winter and summer views

trustStrip.guestFavoriteSubtitle: One of the most loved homes on Airbnb, according to guests

cabinPromoBar.craftLine: Craft your perfect stay — guided, off-grid experience design

chatWidget.welcome: Ask me about access, amenities, the hot tub, showers, road conditions, or which stay fits you best.
chatWidget.fallbackWhatsapp: I'd love to help with that personally. Reach me on WhatsApp and I'll get back to you.
chatWidget.errorWhatsapp: Something went wrong. Reach me on WhatsApp and I'll help you directly.
